title: The carpenter's and joiner's repository: or, A new system of lines and proportions for Doors, Windows, Chimnies, Cornices & Mouldings, For Finishing of Rooms
titleComplement: A great variety of stair-cases, On a Plan entirely New, and easy to be understood. Circular Circular Soffits, flewing and winding, in straight and circular Walls, Groins, Angle Brackets, circular and elliptical Sky-Lights; and the Method of Squaring and Preparing their circular Bars, Shop Fronts, &c. By W. Pain, Joiner. Engraved on sixty-nine copper-plates.

currentLocation: Réserve Edmond de Rothschild / The carpenter's and joiner's repository: or, A new system of lines and proportions for Doors, Windows, Chimnies, Cornices & Mouldings, For Finishing of Rooms [...] By W. Pain, Joiner. Engraved on sixty-nine copper-plates. / L 521 LR
description:
Description de l'album :[Sur la page de titre] : London: Printed for the Author ; And Sold by I. Taylor, at the Bible and Crown, in Holborn, near Chancery-Lane. MDCCLXXVIII.
Un volume, in-4, reliure en veau Lavallière.
84 folios, page de titre sur le folio 1, Soixante-neuf illustrations à pleine page sur les folios 3, 4, 6 à 20, 22 à 35, 37 à 52, 54 à 58, 60 à 62, 64 à 66, 68, 69, 71 à 73, 75, 77, 79, 81 à 83.
